activity.dau_estimate: Unable to access real-time DefiLlama; see data_quality note
activity.borrower_count_trend_90d: Positive trend through Feb 2025; April 2026 shows KelpDAO exploit impact with borrowing spike ($300M+)
activity.note: Aave processed $210M liquidations Feb 4 2025 without bad debt; demonstrates robust risk controls

exchange_flows_30d.trend: Rising exchange reserves signal sell-off risk; pulled from earlier ~2.07M in Feb 2026
exchange_flows_30d.exchange_whale_ratio: Elevated; large holder outflows to CEX in April post-exploit
exchange_flows_30d.aave_token_volume_cexx: Top-50 token; deep liquidity across Binance, Kraken, Coinbase
exchange_flows_30d.wash_trade_concern: Minimal; AAVE has institutional-grade CEX liquidity

holder_cohort.top_100_trend: Increased from 62.34% in early 2026; whale accumulation
holder_cohort.exchange_supply_trend: Decreased from 40.16%; retail/whale withdrawal to cold storage
holder_cohort.stkaaave_participation_assessment: Strong; Umbrella system (launched June 2025) features dynamic rewards; governance stakers at ~2.5M stkAAVE. Anti-GHO distributed to stkAAVE holders (80%) + stkBPT (20%); ~$6M annual Anti-GHO distribution from GHO revenue
holder_cohort.smart_money_bias: 59.3% long bias recorded; smart money accumulating despite price weakness
holder_cohort.whale_positioning_note: Bifurcated: strategic whales accumulated at $90-100 range post-KelpDAO exploit (April 2026), while retail fled. Smaugvision wallet sold 20k AAVE at $103/token; second whale 0xFC56 sold 20k at $103 avg—clear volatility-driven exit

anti_gho_buyback_flows.buyback_impact: Positive; $1M weekly = ~$24M over 6 months. Reduces sell pressure as protocol phases out staking emissions and uses GHO revenue instead of new AAVE issuance
anti_gho_buyback_flows.anti_gho_token_mechanics: Non-transferable ERC-20 earned from stkAAVE/stkBPT; redeemable for stkGHO or GHO debt repayment. ~$6M annual distribution to stakers
anti_gho_buyback_flows.float_consumption_status: BULLISH; buybacks consuming float via DAO treasury revenue. No new AAVE issuance pressure; protocol shifts to stablecoin/ETH opex
anti_gho_buyback_flows.aave_will_win_proposal: Approved April 13 2026; redirects 100% Aave-branded product revenue to DAO treasury, supporting buyback program

retention_health.borrower_count_trend_label: Mixed; growth phase interrupted by April 2026 KelpDAO exploit
retention_health.borrower_count_april_2026_note: KelpDAO rsETH exploit (April 19) triggered liquidations; $300M borrowing spike suggests liquidity crunch; not terminal, but retention pressure short-term
retention_health.retention_signal: Medium-term concern: Chaos Labs (risk manager) exited April 2026; BGD Labs and Aave Chan Initiative also departed. Talent attrition + V4 complexity = execution risk

growth_authenticity.market_dominance: 59.79% DeFi lending market share; #1 protocol by TVL
growth_authenticity.v4_launch: March 30 2026; significant upgrade; market has not yet repriced; smart money accumulating beneath resistance
growth_authenticity.growth_authenticity_assessment: AUTHENTIC; DeFi lending fundamentals strong. Aave V3 $57.35B supplied, $24.13B borrowed (mid-2025). V4 launch + Umbrella staking + GHO revenue growth = durable flywheel. Exploit disruption temporary.
growth_authenticity.institutional_adoption: sGHO vault (4.25% APR fixed) launched to attract retail/institutional deposits. Aave App on iOS Nov 2025; targeting 1M users by early 2026
growth_authenticity.risk_context: April 2026 KelpDAO exploit external to Aave; highlighted cascade liquidations. Aave risk controls passed test (no bad debt); but contributor exodus (Chaos Labs, BGD) raises governance/execution uncertainty

wash_trade_assessment.token_status: Top-50 by market cap; deep CEX liquidity (Binance, Kraken, Coinbase, Bybit)
wash_trade_assessment.volume_quality: Real; driven by institutional/whale positioning, GHO/governance mechanics, leverage trading, arbitrage
wash_trade_assessment.wash_trade_risk: MINIMAL to NONE. AAVE is mature, liquid, and subject to CEX regulatory scrutiny

rationale: Aave demonstrates durable on-chain health despite April 2026 KelpDAO exploit disruption. TVL +45% YoY, market dominance at 59.79% lending share, and GHO revenue acceleration ($4M Q3 2025) confirm core protocol strength. Smart money accumulation (59.3% long bias, top-100 concentration rising to 80.36%) suggests informed capital sees valuation opportunity at $90-100 range. Anti-GHO buyback program ($1M weekly for 6 months) paired with Umbrella staking (dynamic rewards, ~$6M Anti-GHO distribution) and 100% revenue-to-DAO (AAW proposal, April 2026) create deflationary mechanics. Retention headwinds: contributor attrition (Chaos Labs, BGD, ACI all exited April 2026), V4 complexity, and short-term borrower stress post-exploit. However, stkAAVE participation (19.6k holders, $269M market cap) and long-term staker commitment remain strong. Exchange flows show rising sell risk (2.23M tokens on CEX as of April 7), but whale cold-storage accumulation (top-100 rising) suggests smart money frontrunning capitulation. Growth authenticity high; wash-trade risk negligible.

limitations: DefiLlama/Aavescan direct access blocked (egress proxy); relied on secondary sources for DAU/active users
Real-time on-chain data snapshot from April 2026 sources; precise 90-day borrower retention trend unavailable
GHO revenue extrapolated from Q3 2025 record ($4M) and governance proposals; April 2026 GHO revenue not yet reported
Smart money positioning inferred from whale tracker reports and exchange flow data; not direct Glassnode/CryptoQuant feed
V4 impact on metrics still materializing; most robust data is V3 + pre-exploit
